header.title: MYCELIUM CORE
admin.label.name: Name
admin.tooltip.fund_from_dev: Transfer 100 ETH from dev account to admin
admin.tooltip.fund_voters: Send ETH to all voters for gas
admin.placeholder.name: e.g. Alice Johnson
admin.toast.dev_funded: Admin funded with 100 ETH from dev account
vote.desc.mass: Automatically cast random votes for all voters from a JSON file or current session.
vote.no_candidates: No candidates loaded -- click Load Candidates
audit.desc.live: Double vote checks during active voting
logs.title: SESSION LOG
logs.tooltip.clear: Clear the display (does not delete the file)
dialog.new_session.title: New Voting Session
dialog.new_session.msg:
This will end the current session and start a new one.
Current session data and logs will be archived.

One session = one voting.
dialog.confirm_funding.title: Confirm Funding
dialog.confirm_funding.msg:
Send {amount} ETH to each of {count} voter(s)?
Total: ~{total} ETH
dialog.confirm_mass_vote.title: Confirm Mass Vote
dialog.confirm_mass_vote.msg:
Cast random votes for {voters} voter(s) among {candidates} candidate(s)?

This action cannot be undone.
dialog.security.title: Security Warning
dialog.security.msg:
Exporting includes private keys in plaintext.
Keep the file strictly secret.
dialog.exit.title: Exit MYCELIUM CORE
dialog.exit.msg: Are you sure you want to exit?
dialog.active_ops.title: Active Operations
dialog.crash.title: Node Crashed
dialog.crash.msg:
The local Geth node stopped unexpectedly.
Please restart the application.
err.not_whitelisted:
This address is not in the whitelist.
Only whitelisted voters can vote.
err.insufficient_balance:
This voter does not have enough ETH to pay for gas.
Fund the voter first via Admin tab.
err.no_dev_mode: This action is only available in dev mode.
about.title: About
about.body:
MYCELIUM CORE — a client for conducting blockchain-based voting on a local private Ethereum network.

Local Geth node, custom VotingCore.sol smart contract, full on-chain event-based audit.

License: MIT
main.toast.first_deploy_hint: Tip: one session = one voting. Use 'New Session' for a new election.
admin.dialog.already_registered.title: Already Registered
admin.dialog.nothing_to_register.title: Nothing to register
admin.dialog.nothing_to_register.msg: Add candidates to the list first.
admin.dialog.not_enough_candidates.title: Not Enough Candidates
admin.dialog.no_voters.title: No Voters
admin.dialog.fields_required: Name, party and address are required.
admin.dialog.duplicate_address: This address is already in the list.
admin.toast.nonce_sync_hint: Nonce will sync on next TX
vote.dialog.not_whitelisted.title: Not Whitelisted
vote.dialog.already_voted.title: Already Voted
vote.dialog.insufficient_balance.title: Insufficient Balance
vote.dialog.no_voters.title: No Voters
vote.dialog.no_voters.session: No voters in session. Generate them in the Admin tab first.
vote.dialog.no_keys.title: No Private Keys
vote.dialog.no_keys.msg: None of the voters have private keys.
vote.dialog.no_candidates.title: No Candidates
vote.dialog.empty_file.title: Empty File
vote.dialog.parse_error.title: Parse Error
vote.toast.sec06_warning: Warning: anyone with a private key can vote on behalf of the voter. Keep keys secure.
vote.confirm.title: Confirm Mass Vote
logs.tooltip.autoscroll: Automatically scroll to bottom on refresh
toast.lang_changed_restart: Language changed. Restart the application for full translation.
vote.dialog.stage.title: Voting Unavailable
vote.dialog.stage.not_started: Voting has not started yet. Admin must press 'Start Voting'.
vote.dialog.stage.finished: Voting has already finished. No new votes accepted.
vote.dialog.stage.no_contract: Contract not deployed. Deploy it on the Admin tab first.
vote.dialog.stage.no_candidates: No candidates registered on-chain yet. Add them via the Admin tab first.
admin.dialog.cannot_start.title: Cannot Start Voting
admin.dialog.cannot_start.no_contract: Contract not deployed. Deploy VotingCore first.
admin.dialog.cannot_start.few_candidates: Only {count} candidates registered. At least 2 required.
admin.dialog.cannot_start.no_whitelist: Whitelist is empty. Add voters via 'Add Voters To Whitelist' first.
admin.tooltip.key_locked: Key locked after deploy. To change it, start a new session.
about.author: Author
header.reset_chain_tooltip: Delete all blockchain data and archives
reset.dialog.title: Reset Blockchain Data (TEST)
reset.dialog.msg:
Old test function, deletes all blockchain data and voting history.

All deployed contracts and sessions will be permanently removed.

This action cannot be undone. Reset?
startup.warn.title: Large Blockchain Data
startup.warn.msg:
Blockchain data folder is {size} MB.

It is recommended to reset it via the 'Reset Blockchain' button in the header.
startup.warn.dont_show: Do not show this message again
reset.dialog.manual_msg:
Could not automatically delete blockchain files — they are locked by a process.

Please terminate geth.exe in Task Manager and manually delete the following folders:

{paths}

Then restart the application.
err.parser.insufficient_funds:
Insufficient funds for gas.
The sender account does not have enough ETH to pay for this transaction.
err.parser.nonce_conflict:
Transaction nonce conflict.
The nonce has already been used.
err.parser.timeout:
Transaction confirmation timed out.
The transaction may still be pending in the mempool.
err.parser.not_whitelisted:
This address is not in the whitelist.
Only whitelisted voters can cast votes.
err.parser.already_voted:
This address has already voted.
Each voter can only vote once.
err.parser.candidate_not_found:
The selected candidate is not registered.
Vote can only be cast for registered candidates.
err.parser.invalid_stage:
Operation not allowed at the current stage.
Check that voting is in the correct phase.
err.parser.unauthorized: Only the contract owner can perform this action.
err.parser.contract_reverted:
Smart contract rejected the transaction.
Check the contract requirements.
err.parser.action.fund: Fund this account from admin wallet?
